bosses.name: False Knight
bosses.description: A maggot piloting stolen armor, posing as a mighty champion.

bosses.name: Failed Champion
bosses.description: A stronger dream version of the False Knight fueled by rage.

bosses.name: Hornet (Protector)
bosses.description: A swift warrior who tests the Knight's strength in Greenpath.

bosses.name: Hornet (Sentinel)
bosses.description: A faster and deadlier rematch against Hornet in Kingdom's Edge.

bosses.name: Gruz Mother
bosses.description: A large flying creature that spawns smaller Gruzzers.

bosses.name: Vengefly King
bosses.description: A giant Vengefly that swoops down aggressively.

bosses.name: Brooding Mawlek
bosses.description: A hidden beast that spits infection and slashes wildly.

bosses.name: Massive Moss Charger
bosses.description: A moss-covered creature that charges relentlessly.

bosses.name: Mantis Lords
bosses.description: Three skilled warriors who fight with precision and honor.

bosses.name: Soul Warrior
bosses.description: A teleporting mage that guards the Soul Sanctum.

bosses.name: Soul Master
bosses.description: A powerful mage obsessed with harnessing soul energy.

bosses.name: Soul Tyrant
bosses.description: The dream form of the Soul Master with enhanced abilities.

bosses.name: Dung Defender
bosses.description: A noble warrior who fights using dung-based attacks.

bosses.name: White Defender
bosses.description: A dream battle version of the Dung Defender at full strength.

bosses.name: Broken Vessel
bosses.description: A fallen vessel reanimated by infection.

bosses.name: Lost Kin
bosses.description: The dream form of Broken Vessel with increased aggression.

bosses.name: Crystal Guardian
bosses.description: A miner overtaken by crystal infection firing lasers.

bosses.name: Enraged Guardian
bosses.description: A stronger version of the Crystal Guardian with faster attacks.

bosses.name: Uumuu
bosses.description: A floating jellyfish protected by electrical shielding.

bosses.name: Watcher Knights
bosses.description: Multiple armored warriors that attack in sequence.

bosses.name: The Collector
bosses.description: A strange creature that traps enemies in jars.

bosses.name: Nosk
bosses.description: A shape-shifting predator that mimics familiar forms.

bosses.name: Traitor Lord
bosses.description: A mantis leader corrupted by infection.

bosses.name: Hive Knight
bosses.description: A loyal guardian of the Hive wielding a lance.

bosses.name: The Hollow Knight
bosses.description: The chosen vessel meant to contain the Radiance.

bosses.name: Radiance
bosses.description: The true source of the infection, fought in dreams.

bosses.name: Absolute Radiance
bosses.description: An enhanced and final form of the Radiance.

bosses.name: Grey Prince Zote
bosses.description: A dream version of Zote with exaggerated power.

bosses.name: God Tamer
bosses.description: A warrior who fights alongside a powerful beast.

bosses.name: Grimm
bosses.description: Leader of the Grimm Troupe wielding fire-based attacks.

bosses.name: Nightmare King Grimm
bosses.description: A faster and more dangerous version of Grimm.

bosses.name: Sly
bosses.description: A small but extremely fast and deadly nailmaster.

bosses.name: Pure Vessel
bosses.description: The Hollow Knight in its prime, with perfect combat ability.
